nodes.label: Dataset audit: Aif360 Lawschool Gpa
nodes.summary: AIF360 regression task with target zfygpa and protected race/gender; raw frame has 22,342 rows and 5.3% duplicate row rate. Raw-vs-dedup ridge sensitivity completed 36/36 runs. The follow-on model-family sweep completed 1316/1316 runs across raw/dedup variants, 47 model configurations, seven conformal methods, and seeds 11/23; resume returned 1316/1316 skipped_completed. Runtime metadata confirms race-primary feature policy with gender retained as a feature.

nodes.label: Dataset audit: Aif360 Lawschool Gpa Dedup
nodes.summary: Exact-deduplicated Law School GPA sensitivity variant derived from aif360_lawschool_gpa. The deduplicated audit has 21,157 rows, duplicate row rate 0.0%, target zfygpa, and protected race/gender columns. It is not an independent source dataset. The model-family sweep completed paired raw/dedup duplicate-sensitivity evidence; dedup has 272/329 strict nominal seed-aggregated rows.

nodes.label: 8141a72a8124
nodes.summary: Git commit evidence node commit:8141a72a8124.

nodes.label: Regression Benchmark Smoke OpenML Mtp2 Oz1143 Oz2bin Descriptor Drop V0
nodes.summary: Policy-gated OpenML mtp2 high-dimensional QSAR descriptor benchmark smoke. Target oz1143 is modeled on the identity scale; oz2_bin is a descriptor-derived diagnostic group; raw oz2 is excluded from model features. This is interval-machinery evidence for high-dimensional drug-design descriptors only, not molecular-design guidance, pharmacological inference, group inference evidence, or validated Venn-Abers regression evidence.

nodes.label: Regression CQR Backend Sweep OpenML Cholesterol Sex Log1p Age Diagnosis Drop V0
nodes.summary: Controlled CQR quantile-backend sweep for the policy-gated OpenML cholesterol benchmark. This varies the internal GradientBoostingRegressor quantile backend used by CQR while preserving the same sex diagnostics, age-bin audit/drop policy, diagnosis/status drop, log1p target modeling, resumable ledger, and Venn-Abers diagnostic-only boundary. This is not clinical inference, medical decision support evidence, population health evidence, sex/gender group inference evidence, final CQR backend selection, or validated Venn-Abers regression evidence.

nodes.label: Regression CQR Backend Sweep OpenML Plasma Retinol Sex Log1p Age Drop V0
nodes.summary: Controlled CQR quantile-backend sweep for the policy-gated OpenML plasma retinol biomarker benchmark. This varies the internal GradientBoostingRegressor quantile backend used by CQR while preserving the same SEX diagnostics, age-bin audit/drop policy, BETAPLASMA co-analyte drop, log1p target modeling, resumable ledger, and Venn-Abers diagnostic-only boundary. This is not clinical inference, population health evidence, cancer-risk evidence, sex/gender group inference evidence, final CQR backend selection, or validated Venn-Abers regression evidence.

nodes.label: Regression Dataset Final Gate Post Selection Validation Bridge UCI Wine Quality V1
nodes.summary: Dataset final-gate post-selection validation bridge for raw UCI Wine Quality. The config clones audited preprocessing, split, target-transform, and conformal runtime settings from the completed duplicate-sensitivity model-family sweep, then applies independent validation seeds, a common alpha grid, one representative ridge model, and the CQR/CV+/Mondrian_abs shortlist. It is validation work-queue evidence only.

nodes.label: Regression Duplicate Cluster Grouped CV Aif360 Lawschool Gpa Model Visible V0
nodes.summary: Grouped-CV plus-family follow-up for the model-visible feature-plus-target duplicate-cluster AIF360 Law School GPA raw-frame sensitivity run. This preserves the aif360_lawschool_gpa dataset, seeds 11 and 23, baseline model grid, identity-scale zfygpa target modeling, race-primary diagnostic grouping, existing-loader feature policy, train-fitted preprocessing, model-visible feature-plus-target duplicate-cluster train/calibration/test allocation, resumable ledger, and prediction-bundle cache. nodes.label: Law School GPA
nodes.summary: Audited via aif360.sklearn.datasets.fetch_lawschool_gpa; raw frame has 22,342 rows and 5.3% duplicate row rate. Raw-vs-dedup ridge smoke completed 36/36 runs. The follow-on model-family sweep completed 1316/1316 runs across raw/dedup variants, 47 model configurations, seven conformal methods, and seeds 11/23; resume returned 1316/1316 skipped_completed. Runtime metadata confirms zfygpa and race are dropped while gender, lsat, and ugpa remain features. Raw has 15/329 strict nominal rows; dedup has 272/329; fast venn_abers_quantile is nominal in 0/94 rows. Treat as duplicate-sensitivity and race-primary interval-calibration evidence only.

nodes.label: Law School GPA Exact-Deduplicated Sensitivity Variant
nodes.summary: Exact duplicate rows were removed after target attachment and missing-token normalization. Deduplicated audit has 21,157 rows and 0.0% duplicate row rate. It was evaluated alongside the raw frame in the 36-run ridge smoke and the 1316-run model-family sweep. In the model-family sweep, dedup has 272/329 strict nominal rows; CQR, Mondrian, split, and split-fallback are nominal in 47/47 rows, while fast venn_abers_quantile is nominal in 0/47 rows. This is a paired sensitivity variant, not an independent source dataset.

nodes.label: Fairlearn Diabetes 130-Hospitals Length of Stay
nodes.summary: Manual Fairlearn/UCI audit/profile generated. Single-seed and three-seed repeated ridge smokes are complete with race as primary group and readmission outcome columns dropped. Repeated smoke covers six conformal methods; normalized_abs is closest to nominal, CQR overcovers with lowest score/gap, and venn_abers_quantile undercovers. Broad sweeps and paper-ready claims remain gated on clinical leakage, bounded/count target treatment, high-missingness semantics, sparse-group policy, and clinical interpretation.

nodes.label: Folktables ACS Income-to-Poverty Ratio Regression WY

A three-seed unweighted ridge identity-scale smoke completed 18/18 runs with RAC1P diagnostics and six conformal methods. CQR has coverage 0.9313 with the lowest interval score 441.8537 and smallest group coverage gap 0.3952, CV+ is closest to nominal at coverage 0.9031, and venn_abers_quantile undercovers at 0.5608. Treat as engineering evidence only; survey/replicate weights, top-code sensitivity, state-panel sampling, target-universe policy, structural missingness, and sparse RAC1P handling remain required before broad claims.

nodes.label: Kin8nm Robot Arm Benchmark

CQR has the lowest nominal-or-above interval score 0.8428 with coverage 0.9024 and theta3_bin gap 0.0889; Mondrian has the smallest gap 0.0416 with coverage 0.9046; CV+ is closest to nominal at coverage 0.9073; fast venn_abers_quantile undercovers at 0.5656. Treat only as synthetic benchmark diagnostics.

nodes.label: Mercury in Bass

nodes.label: Newton Hematopoiesis Cells Percentage

CV+ has the lowest interval score 556.4686 with coverage 0.9263 and fsex gap 0.1432; CQR has the smallest fsex gap 0.0505 with coverage 0.9263; fast venn_abers_quantile undercovers at 0.6316. nodes.label: Statistical Sleuth Ex1714 Chicago Insurance Redlining Involuntary Activity
nodes.summary: Derived-target smoke from OpenML id 659, separate from the default-target income source-review record. Five-seed ridge identity-scale smoke completed 30/30 runs with 30/30 resume skips. Runner derives race_bin from raw race, drops zip/race/vol, and prediction metadata records final model features fire, theft, age, and income. CQR is the only nominal-or-above row with coverage 0.9400, race_bin gap 0.1333, mean width 2.6411, and interval score 3.3211. CV+ has the lowest interval score 2.4261 but undercovers at 0.8800. Fast venn_abers_quantile undercovers at 0.8000 with race_bin gap 0.5000.

nodes.label: SMSA NOx
nodes.summary: Policy-gated aggregate metropolitan air-pollution smoke completed 30/30 ridge runs across five seeds and six conformal methods; resume returned 30/30 skipped_completed. Runner derives nonwhite_bin from %NonWhite as the primary diagnostic group and income_bin as a secondary audit group; model features exclude raw %NonWhite, income, Mortality, HCPot, NOxPot, S02Pot, and income_bin. cv_plus has highest coverage at 0.9500 with group gap 0.1000; split_abs/mondrian_abs/normalized_abs cover 0.9333 with interval score 111.3569; cqr covers 0.9167; fast venn_abers_quantile undercovers at 0.8000 with gap 0.6200. Treat only as aggregate proxy benchmark evidence.

nodes.label: Social Mobility Sons Current Occupation Counts
nodes.summary: Policy-gated aggregate social-mobility count smoke completed 30/30 ridge log1p runs across five seeds and six conformal methods; resume returned 30/30 skipped_completed. Rows are aggregate count cells, not individuals. Runner uses race diagnostics, drops counts_for_sons_first_occupation as a related co-outcome, and model features are fathers_occupation, sons_occupation, and family_structure. CQR has the lowest interval score 85.0692 but the largest race coverage gap 0.1374; Mondrian has the smallest race coverage gap 0.0277; CV+ is closest to nominal coverage at 0.9043; fast venn_abers_quantile undercovers at 0.5509. Treat only as aggregate count-cell benchmark evidence.

Treat as aggregate spatial benchmark evidence only.

nodes.label: Audited CQR CV+ Main Candidates
nodes.summary: Research Document claim `audited_cqr_cvplus_main_candidates` with status main_candidate_with_dataset_gates: Within datasets whose split, leakage, duplicate, endpoint, and claim-boundary gates pass, fixed-backend CQR and CV+ are practical main candidate conformal methods for regression benchmark tables.

nodes.label: CQR Backend Sensitivity Evidence Limit

nodes.label: Final Selection And Group Inference Claims Beyond this study
nodes.summary: Research Document claim `final_selection_and_group_inference_claims_beyond_current_study` with status beyond this study: Choosing a final conformal method/model, publication-ready group-inference conclusions, population inference, legal/policy guidance, production readiness, bounded-support validity, and Venn-Abers regression-bridge validation claims are beyond this study until dedicated evidence gates explicitly pass.

nodes.label: Lawschool Model Visible Duplicate Sensitivity Pending
nodes.summary: Research Document claim `lawschool_model_visible_duplicate_sensitivity_pending` with status robustness_evidence_gate_passed_with_caveats: The Lawschool GPA model-visible feature-plus-target duplicate-cluster sensitivity has a completed model run, sidecar bundle, KG refresh, and retrospective methodology gate; it closes only that duplicate-scope caveat, while feature-only repeats and broader study caveats remain out of scope.

nodes.label: Main Result Candidate Bundles Beyond this study Diagnostic Evidence
nodes.summary: Research Document claim `main_result_candidate_bundles_beyond_current_study_diagnostic_evidence` with status diagnostic_candidate_evidence_beyond_current_study_no_main_result_promotion: 6 fresh-seed main_result_candidate bundles have completed ledgers, feature-leakage audits, endpoint audits, publication manifests, and bundle-index coverage; they are diagnostic no-promotion evidence and cannot support a final main-result claim while paper gates remain beyond this study.

nodes.label: NHANES Bmi Row Signature Duplicate Sensitivity Pending
nodes.summary: Research Document claim `nhanes_bmi_row_signature_duplicate_sensitivity_pending` with status robustness_evidence_gate_passed_with_caveats: The NHANES 2017-2018 BMI duplicate-scope follow-up now has completed row-signature and model-visible feature-plus-target duplicate-cluster sensitivity bundles, post-run sidecars, and a refreshed retrospective methodology gate. The refreshed remediation backlog marks both NHANES BMI duplicate-scope actions as covered by sensitivity, while broader study caveats remain open.

nodes.label: NHANES Glycohemoglobin Row Signature Duplicate Sensitivity Pending
nodes.summary: Research Document claim `nhanes_glycohemoglobin_row_signature_duplicate_sensitivity_pending` with status robustness_evidence_gate_passed_with_caveats: The NHANES 2017-2018 glycohemoglobin duplicate-scope follow-up now has completed row-signature and model-visible feature-plus-target duplicate-cluster sensitivity bundles, post-run sidecars, and a refreshed retrospective methodology gate. The refreshed remediation backlog marks the glycohemoglobin row-signature and model-visible feature-plus-target duplicate-scope actions as covered by sensitivity, while broader NHANES/study caveats remain open.

nodes.label: NHANES Systolic Bp Row Signature Duplicate Sensitivity Pending
nodes.summary: Research Document claim `nhanes_systolic_bp_row_signature_duplicate_sensitivity_pending` with status robustness_evidence_gate_passed_with_caveats: The NHANES 2017-2018 systolic BP duplicate-scope follow-up now has completed row-signature and model-visible feature-plus-target duplicate-cluster sensitivity bundles, post-run sidecars, and a refreshed retrospective methodology gate. The refreshed remediation backlog marks the systolic BP row-signature and model-visible feature-plus-target duplicate-scope actions as covered by sensitivity, while broader NHANES/study caveats remain open.

nodes.label: Stackoverflow Model Visible Duplicate Sensitivity Pending
nodes.summary: Research Document claim `stackoverflow_model_visible_duplicate_sensitivity_pending` with status robustness_evidence_gate_passed_with_caveats: The StackOverflow 2025 compensation model-visible feature-plus-target duplicate-cluster sensitivity has setup, split profile, publication manifest, claim-boundary records, a complete 2,184-row ledger, post-run sidecars, paired row-signature-vs-model-visible sensitivity evidence, and endpoint audit evidence. It supports scoped model-visible feature-plus-target duplicate-scope robustness evidence with endpoint and scope caveats.

nodes.label: Stackoverflow Row Signature Duplicate Sensitivity Pending
nodes.summary: Research Document claim `stackoverflow_row_signature_duplicate_sensitivity_pending` with status robustness_evidence_gate_passed_with_caveats: The StackOverflow 2025 compensation row-signature duplicate-cluster sensitivity has a completed ledger, post-run sidecars, full-method endpoint audit, and refreshed methodology gate. It supports full-row duplicate-signature split-methodology robustness evidence with caveats; it does not support method-selection, compensation, group inference, bounded-support, model-visible duplicate closure, or Venn-Abers validation claims.

nodes.label: UCI Wine Model Visible Duplicate Sensitivity Pending
nodes.summary: Research Document claim `uci_wine_model_visible_duplicate_sensitivity_pending` with status robustness_evidence_gate_passed_with_caveats: The UCI Wine Quality model-visible feature-plus-target duplicate-cluster sensitivity has a completed ledger, post-run summary, feature-leakage audit, paired row-signature-vs-model-visible sensitivity comparison, endpoint audit, and completed-run manifest update. It supports model-visible duplicate-scope split-methodology robustness evidence with caveats; it does not support wine-science, product-ranking, bounded-ordinal validity, study-wide method choice, protected-group inference, production, or Venn-Abers validation claims.

nodes.label: UCI Wine Row Signature Duplicate Sensitivity Pending
nodes.summary: Research Document claim `uci_wine_row_signature_duplicate_sensitivity_pending` with status robustness_evidence_gate_passed_with_caveats: The UCI Wine Quality row-signature duplicate-cluster sensitivity has a completed ledger, post-run summary, feature-leakage audit, paired baseline-vs-row-signature sensitivity comparison, endpoint audit, and completed-run manifest update. It supports full-row duplicate-signature split-methodology robustness evidence with caveats; it does not support wine-science, product-ranking, bounded-ordinal validity, study-wide method choice, protected-group inference, production, or Venn-Abers validation claims.

nodes.label: Venn Abers Fast Bridge Negative Result
nodes.summary: Research Document claim `venn_abers_fast_bridge_negative_result` with status diagnostic: The current fast Venn-Abers quantile bridge for regression is retained as negative/failure-mode evidence because it often undercovers; the split fallback is an ordinary split-conformal envelope, not a Venn-Abers regression method with validated interval coverage.

nodes.label: Workbench Resumable Regression Cp
nodes.summary: Research Document claim `workbench_resumable_regression_cp` with status benchmark: The repository implements a resumable, policy-gated regression conformal-prediction workbench with ledgers, sidecars, audits, gates, and knowledge-graph traceability.

nodes.label: Controlled Skip Count
nodes.summary: Count of expected controlled skipped atomic experiment rows.

nodes.label: coverage
nodes.summary: Fraction of test labels inside the prediction interval.

nodes.label: Coverage Error Abs
nodes.summary: Absolute deviation from the nominal target coverage.

nodes.label: Coverage Gap
nodes.summary: Maximum group coverage spread for the configured diagnostic group.

nodes.label: Endpoint Crossings
nodes.summary: Count of reconstructed intervals with lower endpoint above upper endpoint.

nodes.label: Endpoint Floor Warning Excursions
nodes.summary: Count of reconstructed endpoints crossing configured floor or warning bounds.

nodes.label: Endpoint Max Width
nodes.summary: Maximum reconstructed prediction interval width in raw target units.

nodes.label: Endpoint Nonfinite
nodes.summary: Count of reconstructed lower or upper endpoints that are not finite.

nodes.label: Endpoint Observed Support Excursions
nodes.summary: Count of reconstructed endpoints or widths outside observed target support diagnostics.

nodes.label: Failure Count
nodes.summary: Count of failed atomic experiment rows.

nodes.label: Interval Score
nodes.summary: Interval score combining width and miss penalties.

nodes.label: Lower Miss Rate
nodes.summary: Fraction of test labels below the lower interval bound.

nodes.label: Mean Width
nodes.summary: Average prediction interval width on the test split.

nodes.label: Median Width
nodes.summary: Median prediction interval width on the test split.

nodes.label: Upper Miss Rate
nodes.summary: Fraction of test labels above the upper interval bound.

nodes.label: Width Gap
nodes.summary: Maximum group interval-width spread for the configured diagnostic group.

nodes.label: Cpfi.regression.venn Abers
nodes.summary: Module evidence at cpfi/regression/venn_abers.py.

nodes.label: USCrime
nodes.summary: Small aggregate state-level crime/demographic dataset; target X requires source-variable semantics.

nodes.label: MercuryinBass
nodes.summary: Environmental mercury target has near target-derived mercury summaries such as Avg_Mercury/min/max.

nodes.label: SMSA
nodes.summary: Aggregate metropolitan NOx target is extremely skewed and NOxPot is perfectly correlated with target.

nodes.label: Brainsize
nodes.summary: Sensitive neuroanatomy/IQ dataset with only 40 rows and missing body-size fields.

nodes.label: FacultySalaries
nodes.summary: Institution-level assistant professor salary target with salary co-outcome leakage; leakage-control policy drops salary co-outcomes and University identity, leaving a dummy-mean no-feature smoke.

nodes.label: ICU
nodes.summary: Small medical ICU source-review candidate with LOC target on 1-3 scale; OpenML target differs from original STA survival/logistic framing.

nodes.label: BNG(lowbwt)
nodes.summary: Synthetic BNG low birth weight classification/logistic dataset with target class; no continuous regression target approved.

nodes.label: BNG(autoPrice)
nodes.summary: One-million-row BNG synthetic expansion of the autoPrice numeric price target; use audited original OpenML auto price records instead.

nodes.label: BNG(pharynx)
nodes.summary: Synthetic BNG pharynx classification dataset with target class and one million rows; not a regression target.

nodes.label: BNG(echoMonths)
nodes.summary: Synthetic BNG echoMonths dataset has target class and classification framing.

nodes.label: BNG(breastTumor)
nodes.summary: One-million-row BNG synthetic expansion of the breastTumor numeric tumor-size target; use audited original OpenML id 224 instead of counting synthetic rows as independent evidence.

nodes.label: kin8nm
nodes.summary: Policy-gated synthetic robot-arm benchmark smoke completed 30/30 ridge identity-scale runs with theta3_bin diagnostics derived from theta3; raw theta3 is dropped from model features, target/group columns are excluded, and prediction metadata confirms seven final theta features. CQR has the lowest nominal-or-above interval score 0.8428 with coverage 0.9024; Mondrian has the smallest theta3_bin gap 0.0416 with coverage 0.9046; fast venn_abers_quantile undercovers at 0.5656.

nodes.label: mbagrade
nodes.summary: Tiny 61-row GPA regression with sex and GMAT predictors; repeated-split policy required.

nodes.label: cleveland
nodes.summary: Heart disease num is an ordinal diagnosis/presence target used for classification, not a standard continuous regression target.
Classic auto price benchmark with 159 cleaned rows and right-skewed price target; not group inference evidence.

Policy-gated tabular control benchmark smoke completed 30/30 ridge identity-scale runs with climbRate_bin diagnostics derived from climbRate; raw climbRate is dropped from model features, target/group columns are excluded, and prediction metadata confirms five final control features. CV+ is the only above-nominal row and has the lowest interval score with coverage 0.9043; normalized_abs has the smallest climbRate_bin gap 0.0539 but is just below nominal; fast venn_abers_quantile undercovers at 0.6072.

nodes.label: lowbwt
nodes.summary: Low birth weight source describes binary low-birth-weight classification/logistic task; target class is not continuous birth weight.

nodes.label: cholesterol
nodes.summary: Policy-gated clinical benchmark diagnostics completed: 30/30 ridge log1p smoke, 384/384 model-family sweep, and 27/27 CQR backend sweep, each with complete resume checks. Runner uses sex diagnostics, age_bin audit context, raw age drop, diagnosis/status num drop, and log1p target modeling. Not clinical inference, final method ranking, final CQR backend selection, group inference evidence, or validated Venn-Abers evidence.

nodes.label: autoPrice
nodes.summary: Numeric price target stored as class; target and common feature matrix match openml_auto_price after upstream deletion of nominal/missing rows.
Small pediatric diabetes biomarker dataset with age covariate and only 43 rows.

nodes.label: pharynx
nodes.summary: Clinical trial pharynx dataset is encoded with target class, not a regression outcome; survival/event semantics require separate methods.

nodes.label: baskball
nodes.summary: Small sports-derived rate target; source describes numeric target as class attribute.
Same row order and target as house_16H with a smaller Census feature subset; not independent evidence.

nodes.label: echoMonths
nodes.summary: Numeric survival target stored as class with alive/status variables and substantial missingness; requires survival/censoring treatment.

nodes.label: breastTumor
nodes.summary: Numeric tumor-size target stored as class in a medical conversion dataset; age field and clinical variables require source and ethical review.

nodes.label: gascons
nodes.summary: Tiny 27-row gasoline consumption time-series/economic dataset with year strongly correlated to target.

nodes.label: hungarian
nodes.summary: Heart disease num is an ordinal diagnosis/presence target with heavy missingness; not a standard continuous regression target.

nodes.label: fishcatch
nodes.summary: Numeric fish-weight target stored as class; Sex is 55% missing and length measurements are near target-deterministic.
OpenML mirror of UCI Communities and Crime normalized dataset; keep for traceability and do not count as independent evidence.

nodes.label: siddiqi
nodes.summary: Drug-design QSAR dataset with only 10 rows and 1143 features; p>>n and near-perfect in-sample correlations.

nodes.label: mtp2
nodes.summary: OpenML mtp2 is a public drug-design descriptor regression benchmark with 274 rows, 1143 columns, target oz1143, no missing target values, no duplicate rows, no sensitive/proxy candidates, 54 full-frame constant descriptors, and top target correlation oz2=0.3720. It adds a high-dimensional QSAR descriptor regime without protected-group population inference claims. The ridge alpha-grid smoke completed 84/84 runs and no-force resume returned 84/84 skipped_completed records. The follow-on model-family sweep completed 714/714 runs across 51 model configurations, seeds 11/23, and seven conformal methods; no-force resume returned 714/714 skipped_completed records. CQR rows use the runner's fixed GradientBoost...

nodes.label: arsenic-male-bladder
nodes.summary: Arsenic aggregate event-count variant; target is zero-inflated and at.risk is an exposure denominator.
Only 20 rows with sensitive IQ target and twin-pair structure.
Small aggregate vehicle-count benchmark with Age/Gender groups; not individual group inference evidence.

Biomedical repeated-measure time-series benchmark now has a policy-gated grouped smoke: weeks_bin diagnostics, id grouped splitting, sample_size dropped as sampling-design metadata, and weeks retained as the sole model feature.
Radiation biology count target with Total_cells denominator and 81.5% duplicate row rate.

nodes.label: baseball-pitcher
nodes.summary: Baseball pitcher salary target has 15% missing target values and right-skewed salary.

nodes.label: veteran
nodes.summary: Veteran lung-cancer survival days with censoring status and age covariate; survival target is right-tailed.
Tiny AnalCatData running-shoes source-review candidate with skewed count-like target and 23.3 percent Income missingness.
Sensitive survey source-review dataset with zero-inflated ordinal/count-like target and sparse behavior groups.
County-level spatial/electoral target with income proxy and coordinate-driven structure.
Medical/nutritional biomarker target with AGE/SEX fields and skewed plasma-retinol target.

nodes.label: arsenic-female-lung
nodes.summary: Arsenic aggregate event-count variant; target is zero-inflated and at.risk is an exposure denominator.

nodes.label: baseball-team
nodes.summary: Tiny 26-row aggregate team salary dataset; not individual group inference evidence.

nodes.label: pbcseq
nodes.summary: PBC longitudinal status is a censored survival/event status target, not ordinary regression.

nodes.label: pbc
nodes.summary: Primary biliary cirrhosis status is a censored survival/event status target, not ordinary regression.

nodes.label: baseball-hitter
nodes.summary: Baseball hitter salary target has 18% missing target values and right-skewed salary.
Aggregate seropositive count dataset with Total denominator highly correlated with target.

nodes.label: boston
nodes.summary: Legacy Boston Housing benchmark with known ethical concerns around race proxy B and capped MEDV target.

nodes.label: arsenic-female-bladder
nodes.summary: Arsenic aggregate event-count variant; target is zero-inflated and at.risk is an exposure denominator.
Group inference-relevant wage regression with SEX/RACE/AGE diagnostics; first log1p ridge smoke passed.
Aggregate demographic count-regression benchmark; numeric regression id 535, not classification id 875.

nodes.label: arsenic-male-lung
nodes.summary: Arsenic aggregate event-count variant; target is zero-inflated and at.risk is an exposure denominator.

nodes.label: houses
nodes.summary: StatLib/Pace-Barry California Housing variant of openml_california_housing; differs by ocean_proximity and total_bedrooms missingness handling.
Ecological count dataset with only 30 rows, missing features, and Native.species near target-derived.

nodes.label: socmob
nodes.summary: Race-stratified aggregate social-mobility count table; rows are count cells, not individuals.
Boston-family source-review dataset with target LSTAT, strong MEDV/CMEDV correlations, AGE proxy, and legacy race-proxy ethics concerns.

nodes.label: sensory
nodes.summary: Repeated sensory experiment with judges, occasions, and blocking factors; ordinary iid split is not appropriate.

nodes.label: kidney
nodes.summary: Kidney frailty target is an author-derived random-effect/survival quantity with repeated patient observations; not ordinary regression evidence.

nodes.label: bodyfat
nodes.summary: OpenML target is named class but represents body-fat percentage; Density is near deterministic with target.
1990 US Census-derived house price benchmark with opaque census feature codes, zero prices, and heavy right skew.
Tiny 47-row Statistical Sleuth income source-review sample with unclear variable semantics.
Tiny Statistical Sleuth medical/biological tumor target with sex field and only 34 rows.
Fienberg-Makov-Sanil disclosure simulation variant with bias and noise perturbation; not independent group inference evidence.
Small social-science Quality target with Age/Gender proxies; source-review only because variable semantics and target scale require manual documentation.
Small sensitive child-IQ target with prior IQ measurements as strong predictors.
Fienberg-Makov-Sanil disclosure simulation unperturbed released-data variant; not independent group inference evidence.
Policy-gated disclosure X_NOISE signed-target variant sensitivity smoke completed 30/30 ridge signed_log1p runs with age_bin diagnostics; not independent group inference evidence.

Promoted to a policy-gated tiny employment/proxy smoke after documenting fsex diagnostics, raw age drop, salary co-outcome drops, log1p target modeling, 30/30 completed runs, and complete resume skips. CQR has smallest fsex gap; CV+ has lowest interval score; fast venn_abers_quantile undercovers.

Promoted to a policy-gated aggregate state education-rank smoke after documenting income_bin diagnostics, raw income drop, identity target modeling, 30/30 completed runs, and complete resume skips. CV+ has lowest interval score; CQR has smallest nominal-or-above income_bin gap; fast venn_abers_quantile undercovers.
Policy-gated disclosure X_BIAS variant sensitivity smoke completed 30/30 ridge log1p runs with age_bin diagnostics; not independent group inference evidence.

nodes.label: Dataset Specific Final Gates
nodes.summary: Paper gate `dataset_specific_final_gates` has status beyond this study: Current completed bundles are robustness/sensitivity evidence with caveats, descriptive dataset result bundles.

nodes.label: Endpoint Bounded Support Gate
nodes.summary: Paper gate `endpoint_bounded_support_gate` has status beyond this study: Endpoint reconstruction hygiene is not the same as bounded-support or target-domain validity.

nodes.label: Group Inference Population Inference Gate
nodes.summary: Paper gate `group_inference_population_inference_gate` has status beyond this study: Group diagnostics cannot be promoted to protected-group population inference, population, legal, policy, or clinical conclusions.

nodes.label: Final Method Model Selection Gate
nodes.summary: Paper gate `final_method_model_selection_gate` has status beyond this study: No final conformal method/model selected method can be claimed.

nodes.label: Multiplicity Selection Record
nodes.summary: Paper gate `multiplicity_selection_record` has status beyond this study: Best/method-selection promotion would be post-hoc and overstate the searched model-method grid.

nodes.label: Venn Abers Regression Validation Gate
nodes.summary: Paper gate `venn_abers_regression_validation_gate` has status beyond this study: The current fast Venn-Abers bridge undercovers and cannot be reported as validated Venn-Abers regression.
